articles.title: Brown scores 35 points as the Celtics beat the Hornets 113-102 to claim the season series
articles.description:
With the win, the Celtics inched closer to locking up the No. 2 playoff seed in the Eastern Conference.

The post Brown scores 35 points as the Celtics beat the Hornets 113-102 to claim the season series appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics defeat Hornets 113-102, securing the season series on April 7.
Jaylen Brown scored 35 points, leading the team in the victory.
Win brings Celtics closer to clinching the No. 2 playoff seed.

articles.title: Hurricanes overcome Geekie’s hat trick, top Bruins in OT to claim the Metropolitan Division title
articles.description:
Jeremy Swayman made 18 saves before being pulled after allowing five goals, including three in the first nine minutes of the second period.

The post Hurricanes overcome Geekie’s hat trick, top Bruins in OT to claim the Metropolitan Division title appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins lost to Hurricanes 6-5 in overtime on April 7, 2026.
Jeremy Swayman made 18 saves before being pulled after five goals allowed.
Hurricanes' victory secures them the Metropolitan Division title, impacting Bruins' playoff positioning.

articles.title: Trevor Story’s 2 RBI double lifts Red Sox over Brewers 3-2 and ends 3-game skid
articles.description:
Garrett Crochet struck out seven for the Red Sox, who won for just the third time in 11 games this season.

The post Trevor Story’s 2 RBI double lifts Red Sox over Brewers 3-2 and ends 3-game skid appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trevor Story's 2 RBI double led the Red Sox to a 3-2 victory over the Brewers.
Garrett Crochet struck out seven batters, contributing to the team's performance.
This win ends a 3-game losing streak, improving the Red Sox's record to 3-8.
